channel.title: Everquest 3 on Chasing Dings!
channel.description: Recent content in Everquest 3 on Chasing Dings!

item.title: EverQuest is dead. Long live EverQuest! New games trying to capture EQ nostalgia are doomed.
item.description: I've been running around in an EverQuest Time-Limited Progression (TLP) server the past couple of days. Is there even such a thing as a new EverQuest player anymore?
